title: Petco (WOOF) Q3 Earnings Report Preview
text: Petco (WOOF) Q3 Earnings Preview. Key Expectations: Analysts anticipate revenue growth of 0.9% year-over-year to approximately $1.51 billion, representing a significant deceleration from the 4% growth recorded in the same quarter last year. Adjusted earnings per share are expected to reach $0.02. Recent Performance Context: In the previous quarter, Petco generated $1.53 billion in revenue with 3.4% year-over-year growth, meeting expectations but missing earnings estimates. The company has demonstrated consistency, missing revenue projections only once in the past two years while exceeding them by an average of 1.8%. Peer Comparison: Similar retailers in the consumer segment have shown mixed results. Tractor Supply reported 4.3% top-line growth but underperformed estimates, while National Vision exceeded projections with 6.6% revenue growth. Tractor Supply's stock declined 6.2% following results, whereas National Vision remained relatively flat. Market Position: Petco shares have appreciated 9.6% over the past month, alongside broader consumer retail strength. Analysts maintain a price target of $6.30, compared to the current stock price of $3.78.
